data.content_ref: inline:The scope excludes 'Nile Delta settlements' while covering the Levantine city-states and Ugarit, but the mechanism—drought-driven mass migration of Sea Peoples toward coasts and Egypt—requires the Delta to be a primary destination and impact zone. If the Delta settlements were unaffected by the same drought that supposedly generated the Sea Peoples migration, the account provides no explanation for why the Delta escaped the raiding and disruption that devastated Ugarit and the Levantine coast, which lie along the same maritime path. The exclusion of the Delta from the scope creates an unexplained asymmetry in the very region the mechanism predicts would be most heavily impacted.
